subject: Local recording conversion stuck at 0%
description: Meeting recorded to disk; double-click recording shows converting progress never advances.

ts_steps.title: Shorten path
ts_steps.action: Move recordings out of deep Documents path if >260 chars.

ts_steps.title: Pause OneDrive
ts_steps.action: If Documents synced — pause during conversion.

ts_steps.title: AV exclusion
ts_steps.action: Temporarily exclude Zoom and recordings folder per security.

ts_steps.title: VC++ runtimes
ts_steps.action: Repair Microsoft Visual C++ redistributables if missing.

ts_steps.title: double_click_to_convert files
ts_steps.action: If present, follow Zoom recovery KB or support.

ts_steps.title: Cloud recording
ts_steps.action: Recommend for future critical meetings if licensed.

internal_information: Permissions, AV lock, OneDrive sync, corrupt recording end.
